ARCHIVEUTIL(1) General Commands Manual ARCHIVEUTIL(1)

NAME

archiveutil — command-line interface for the Archive Utility application.

SYNOPSIS

archiveutil command [options]

DESCRIPTION

archiveutil is a command-line utility for working with archive files on macOS. It provides various operations for extracting and manipulating archive formats.

COMMANDS

extractXcodeAEA path
Extract an Xcode AEA (Apple Encrypted Archive) file at the specified path.

EXAMPLES

Extract an Xcode AEA archive:

$ archiveutil extractXcodeAEA /path/to/Xcode.aea

SEE ALSO

ditto(1), tar(1), zip(1), unzip(1)

HISTORY

The archiveutil utility first appeared in macOS 15.0.

October 14, 2025 Darwin
